docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDCE AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. CASE SETTLED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED NOV-18-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BYUN, JUSTIN
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY WU, GUANGQIANG AS TO DEFENDANT BYUN, JUSTIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-15-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WU, GUANGQIANG AS TO DEFENDANT BYUN, JUSTIN

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF STATES THAT THE CASE HAS BEEN SETTLED. PLAINTIFF GUANGQIANG WU IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY HIS SON BY CELL PHONE WHO REPRESENTS TO THE CLERK THAT A SETTLEMENT HAS BEEN REACHED BETWEEN HIS FATHER (PLAINTIFF) AND DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT JUSTIN BYUN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
